title: Code with Claude Tokyo 2026: Opening Keynote
summary: Anthropic held an opening keynote at Code with Claude 2026 in Tokyo featuring engineering and product leaders. The event provided updates on company developments and strategic direction.
writeup: This video is the opening keynote from Anthropic's Code with Claude 2026 event in Tokyo, presented by engineering and product leaders. It covers company developments and strategic direction. The keynote matters as a venue for Anthropic to communicate updates directly to its developer audience. The summary does not specify which features, products, or numbers were announced.
